steps.title: Use the tracking context
steps.content: Fox-Foot avoids fire, avoids landing, and keeps moving because he suspects the group is being followed. He wants to leave no sign of their passage.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice B means a flaw or stain, Choice C means a quantity, and Choice D means a drawing. None fits something pursuers could notice after travelers pass through.

steps.title: Choose signs of passage
steps.content: Choice A fits because evidence means a sign or proof of the group's movement, exactly what Fox-Foot wants to avoid leaving. The answer is A.
